data.title: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. Announces Financial Results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported a GAAP net income of $1.6 million, equivalent to $0.12 per basic weighted average common share. Additionally, Distributable Earnings totaled $3.5 million, or $0.27 per basic weighted average common share.

data.title: Expect Hedera's HBAR to hit $0.16 in April despite trading at $0.095 now, with neutral RSI and bearish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Hedera is currently trading at $0.095, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish momentum. Despite a consolidation phase around vital support levels, technical analysis indicates a possible recovery towards the $0.16 target.

data.title: United Homes Group, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: United Homes Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UHG) disclosed its financial performance for the last quarter and fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, the Company reported a net income of $3.2 million, translating to $0.05 per diluted share. This figure included a gain of $22.1 million from the alteration in fair value of derivative liabilities. The fluctuation in fair value on the Company's warrants was a significant factor contributing to this change.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $90 On Tanker Attacks, Port Disruption
data.description: The stock market experienced a decline in futures as oil prices continued to rise, surpassing $90 due to tanker attacks and port disruptions amid the ongoing conflict with Iran. Additionally, positive news from Nvidia and Oracle caused an increase in AI stocks on Wednesday. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: REX American Resources to Report Q4 and Full Fiscal Year 2025 Results and Host a Conference Call and Webcast on March 26, 2026
data.description: In Dayton, Ohio, REX American Resources Corporation, a prominent ethanol producer listed on NYSE under REX, revealed plans to release its operational and financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, March 26, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results. Interested individuals can join the conference call by dialing (877) 269-7751 (US) or (201) 389-0908.

data.title: Dale Carnegie Wrote Bestsellers On How To Achieve Success
data.description: Born in 1888, Dale Carnegie initially faced challenges in his early career. However, he later became a prominent figure in the field of success, impacting millions through his work. Carnegie authored bestsellers offering guidance on achieving success, leaving a lasting legacy.

data.title: Orion Digital Reports Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Results; Wealth Revenue Grows 36% as Subscription & Services Reach 62% of Revenue
data.description: Orion Digital Corp (NASDAQ: ORIO; TSX: ORIO) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. The company specializes in a digital wealth platform with payment infrastructure for transaction authorization in financial networks. Revenue primarily comes from recurring subscription and services, with a focus on Intelligent In.

data.title: America’s Car-Mart Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: In a press release on March 12, 2026, America’s Car-Mart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRMT) disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on January 31, 2026. The company, headquartered in Rogers, Arkansas, shared these crucial updates but did not specify the exact numbers involved.

data.title: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Announces Agreement to Acquire Family First Homecare
data.description: A home care company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH), specializing in caring for medically complex and high-cost patients, revealed its plan to purchase Family First Holding, LLC, known as Family First Homecare. The agreement was announced on March 12, 2026, in Atlanta. This move is a part of Aveanna's strategy to expand its services and reach a wider patient base.

data.title: Beneficient Appoints Mack H. Hicks to Board of Directors
data.description: Beneficient, listed on Nasdaq as BENF, has recently welcomed Mack H. Hicks to its Board of Directors.

data.title: North American Niobium acquires more Quebec niobium and rare earth assets, expanding its holdings in the region.
data.description: The recent data released shows a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the numbers rising to 7.5% in comparison to last month's 6.2%. This surge represents a total of 1.5 million individuals currently without jobs. Additionally, the report indicates a decline in GDP growth, falling to 2.1% from the previous 3.5%. These statistics reveal a challenging economic outlook for the upcoming months, urging the need for strategic interventions to stabilize the situation.

data.title: Helus Pharma Strengthens Executive Team with Appointment of Jill Conwell as Chief People Officer
data.description: A pharmaceutical company, Helus Pharma TM, listed on Nasdaq as HELP and Cboe CA as HELP, based in New York and Toronto, disclosed the hiring of Jill Conwell as Chief People Officer. The company focuses on creating novel serotonergic agonists known as NSAs. The appointment of Conwell, effective immediately, was declared on March 12, 2026.

data.title: Renx Enterprises Corp. Deploys Automated Screening System at Myakka City Operations
data.description: In Miami, FL, on March 12, 2026, RenX Enterprises Corp. revealed the deployment of a Komptech XL3 trommel screener with an automated three-stacker conveyor system at its authorized 80+ acre organics processing site in Myakka City, Florida, starting from March 10, 2025. This equipment was introduced through a rental agreement to assess potential operational improvements, as RenX evaluates efficiency at the facility.

data.title: InflaRx to Report Full Year 2025 Results on March 19, 2026
data.description: JENA, Germany - InflaRx N.V. (Nasdaq: IFRX), a leading biopharmaceutical firm focusing on anti-inflammatory treatments via the complement system, stated today that its financial and operational outcomes for Q4 and the entirety of 2025 will be disclosed on March 19, 2026, prior to market hours. There will be no associated conference call.

data.title: Notice of Knight Therapeutics' Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Results Conference Call
data.description: Montreal-based Knight Therapeutics Inc. (TSX: GUD) will disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on March 19, 2026, before the market opens. As a leading specialty pharmaceutical firm operating across the Americas (excluding the USA), Knight will also conduct a conference call and audio webcast post-release. Individuals keen on this update are encouraged to join the call to gain insights into the company's recent financial figures.
